name: Aadhaar Card (Enrollment & Update)
short_description: Get or update your 12-digit unique national identity number containing your biometric and demographic details.
required_documents: Proof of Address (e.g., Utility Bill, Passport)
Proof of Date of Birth (e.g., Birth Certificate, SSLC Book)
eligibility: Residents of India (living in India for 182 days or more in the last 12 months).

name: PAN Card (New & Correction)
short_description: Apply for a Permanent Account Number for financial, banking, and income tax operations.
eligibility: All Indian citizens, business entities, and tax-paying entities.

name: Birth Certificate
short_description: Register and obtain official governmental certification of a child's birth details.
required_documents: Hospital Discharge Slip or Signed Affidavit
Identity Proof of Parents (Aadhaar or Voter ID)
eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a newborn child born within municipal limits.

name: Death Certificate
short_description: Obtain official certification of the death of a citizen for legal and financial settlements.
required_documents: Hospital Medical Death Certificate or Cremation Slip
Identity Proof of the Deceased (e.g., Aadhaar Card)
eligibility: Immediate family members or close relatives of the deceased individual.

name: Marriage Certificate & Registration
short_description: Officially register and obtain proof of a marriage under the Special or Hindu Marriage Act.
required_documents: Age Proof of Bride (18+) and Groom (21+)
Address Proof of Bride and Groom
eligibility: Legally married couples (Groom aged 21+ and Bride aged 18+).

name: Voter ID Card (EPIC)
short_description: Apply for a voter identification card to exercise your franchise in national, state, and local elections.
required_documents: Address Proof (e.g., Gas Bill, Rent Agreement)
eligibility: Indian citizens who are 18 years of age or older on the qualifying date.

name: Income Certificate
short_description: Get certified proof of your annual household income to apply for scholarships or welfare schemes.
required_documents: Salary Slip, IT Return, or signed Income Self-Declaration Affidavit
Address Proof (e.g., Ration Card, Aadhaar Card)
eligibility: Residents who need to prove their family income level for educational or welfare concessions.

name: Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC)
short_description: Access reservation benefits and scholarships by proving your social caste or tribe classification.
required_documents: Caste proof of family members (e.g., father's caste certificate)
eligibility: Citizens belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, or Other Backward Classes.

name: Domicile / Residence Certificate
short_description: Obtain official certification of your permanent state residence for jobs, education, and state quotas.
required_documents: Proof of continuous residence (e.g., School certificates, land records)
eligibility: Citizens residing continuously in the specific state or union territory for a set number of years (usually 5-15 years).

name: Ration Card (New & Update)
short_description: Apply for or modify your ration card to receive subsidized foodgrains and grains under state schemes.
required_documents: Family Details and passport-size photographs of members
Address Proof (e.g., Electricity Bill, Gas Book)
eligibility: Head of the family (prioritizing the oldest female member) residing in the state.

name: Disability Certificate (UDID)
short_description: Apply for a Unique Disability ID (UDID) to access government reservations, subsidies, and assistance.
required_documents: Medical Assessment Report from a Government Hospital
eligibility: Persons with a diagnosed, permanent disability of 40% or more.

name: Old-Age / Widow / Disability Pension Scheme
short_description: Apply for monthly financial pension support under government social security welfare programs.
required_documents: Age Proof or Relationship/Death Certificate of Spouse (for widow pension)
eligibility: Senior citizens (60+), widows, or disabled individuals with family income below the poverty threshold.

name: New Water Connection & Complaint
short_description: Apply for a fresh municipal water pipeline connection or report leaks and pressure issues.
required_documents: Property Ownership Proof (Sale Deed or Tax Receipt)
eligibility: Owners or legally authorized tenants of a property located within the municipal water supply grid.

name: New Electricity Connection & Complaint
short_description: Request a new power connection for domestic/commercial property, or file outage and billing grievances.
eligibility: Property owners or lawful occupants of the premises requesting service.

name: Property Tax Payment & Assessment
short_description: Access property assessment documents, calculate your property tax liabilities, and pay bills online.
eligibility: Owners of land and residential or commercial properties within the municipal limits.

name: Trade License
short_description: Apply for authorization from the local municipality to run a trade, shop, or commercial business.
required_documents: Shop/Establishment Address Proof (Rent deed or tax bill)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from neighbors or Fire Department if applicable
eligibility: Business owners starting commercial operations in approved municipal zones.

name: Driving License (New & Renewal)
short_description: Apply for a standard vehicle driving permit or renew your expired driving license at the RTO.
required_documents: Medical Certificate (Form 1A, required for commercial or 50+ age)
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18 or above (16 for gearless scooters) holding a valid learner's license.

name: Vehicle Registration Certificate (RC)
short_description: Register a new motor vehicle to obtain a Registration Certificate (RC) and license plate numbers.
required_documents: Sale Certificate (Form 21) from the automobile dealer
eligibility: Owner of a motor vehicle purchased through an authorized regional dealership.

name: Ayushman Bharat / Health Insurance Scheme
short_description: Enroll in the national health protection scheme offering free cashless health insurance cover up to Rs. 5 Lakhs.
eligibility: Identified low-income and socio-economically marginalized families under the SECC registry.

name: Student Scholarship Schemes
short_description: Apply for state or national educational scholarships for financial aid in schools, colleges, or universities.
eligibility: Regular students enrolled in government-recognized institutions meeting specific category or low-income criteria.
